description: Notra turns engineering and product activity into publish-ready changelogs, blog posts, social posts, and related marketing content in a team’s brand voice. It also connects workspace integrations such as GitHub and provides chat, scheduling, and reusable writing-skill features.
summary: usenotra.com exposes an authenticated REST API at api.usenotra.com, an OAuth/API-key protected MCP server at mcp.usenotra.com, and a Notra CLI authenticated with Notra API keys.

packages.runtimeHint: global install via bun add -g notra
